title: gompholobium simplicifolium
intro: Gompholobium simplicifolium, also known as the simple-leaved wedge-pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gompholobium simplicifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Gompholobium simplicifolium can be made into a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
